titleStmt.title: SII 38.517: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 517. (A.R. No. 517 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, right of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged in the middle. Begins with the historical introduction of the ruler, pū-maruviya etc.,

Records the gift of four cows by Tiruveṇkāḍu-uḍaiyāṉ alias Abhimānamērukkoṟṟakkuḍai Kōn, a resident of Viśalūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu, for burning a twilight lamp to the god of Ūṟṟattūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. Three Śivabrāhmaṇas, who received these cows agreed to burn the said lamp at night.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātuñ jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pūkaḻmātumRead pukaḻmātum
nayantu pulka Āruma� ti neṟiyanaittum taḻaippa varumuṟai yurimaiyil maṇimuṭi
cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇ kkeḷikaṟaṭṭu nikkūṭattānena viḷaṅka karuṅka
lippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappaporu
kaḷar pallavan mutaliyār pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpil maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempon viraciṅ
hāsanattu pūvaṉaRead puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tripuvaṉac
cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrā[ja]rājadevarkku yāṇṭu patineṭṭāvatu vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟa
ṭāṟku �
vaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu vicalūr kiḻa cca Uṭaiyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyānāna A
pimānameruk koṟṟakkuṭaik konen nāyanāṟku canti viḷakku viṭṭa pacu nālu Ip
pacu nālum Ikkoyilkāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇan kārkkiyan mātevan tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyānāna naraciṅkapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa pacu Iraṇṭum Ikkoyil kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirā
maṇaṉ kārkkiyaṉ periyāṉ kaṇavatiyāṉ kākkunāyaka paṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa pacu Oṉṟum Ikko
yil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ kārkki periyāṉāṉa Uttamacoḻapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa
pacu Oṉṟum Ā cu nālu Ippacu ṉāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu Iravu Oru santiviḷakku Erikka
kaṭavomāka cammatittu kaikkoṇṭom .
Digital edition of SII 38.517 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
